revision.comment: Initial creation
revision.text:
{afc comment|1=wikidata item [[d:Q135039227]]~~~~} '''Kusasa Shrine''' is a [[List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province|Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]].
==References== [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Importing the Settsu ones now in the same form
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata link templates
Bot: categorize based on Wikidata P11250 property
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=wikidata item [[d:Q135039227]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:14, 5 August 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kusasa Shrine''' is a [[List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province|Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]].<ref>http://engishiki.org/settu/bun/st061202-01.html</ref><ref>https://www.osaka-jinjacho.jp/funai_jinja/dai1shibu/nose-cho/01020kusasajinja.html</ref><ref>https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181081</ref>

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''Kusasa Shrine''' is a [[List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province|Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]].<ref>http://engishiki.org/settu/bun/st061202-01.html</ref><ref>https://www.osaka-jinjacho.jp/funai_jinja/dai1shibu/nose-cho/01020kusasajinja.html</ref><ref>https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181081</ref>
==References==

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:1000 shortest pages as of Nov 16, 2025]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
